fn_def_list.fn_code:
int
i386_stap_is_single_operand (struct gdbarch *gdbarch, const char *s)
{
  return (*s == '$' /* Literal number.  */
	  || (isdigit (*s) && s[1] == '(' && s[2] == '%') /* Displacement.  */
	  || (*s == '(' && s[1] == '%') /* Register indirection.  */
	  || (*s == '%' && isalpha (s[1]))); /* Register access.  */
}
